description: baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in black with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this smooth synthetic leather bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 27 cmWidth: 44 cmDepth: 11 cmMade of smooth synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with one internal zipped pocket One zipped pocket on the side of the main compartment and one compartment with a magnectic buttoned closure on the other side for enhanced spaceTwo short handles for carrying ease Small pocket on the backTwo zipped pockets on the front with asymmetric openingsBuckle design and stitch detailing for styleStylish, easy to grip, synthetic leather zip pullsBrand name printed below the back pocketBag careWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
